Off Calendar Aug-31-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PETITIONER 1818 BROADWAY CONDOMINIUM HOEOWNERS ASSOCIATION Motion to Strike and Tax Costs Claimed by Ruth Lama and Roy Ans. No appearances on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Granted. No opposition filed. (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) (302/REQ)Judge: Ronald Evans Quidachay, Court Reporter: Robert Balian, CSR #5220

Notice Of Hearing On Petition For Reformation Of The Restated Declaration Of Covenants, Conditions And Restrictions; Declarations Henry Winetsky , Keith Kelly; Elvia Cowan; And Connie Buffor And Request For Judicial Notice
Off Calendar Jul-21-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PETITIONER 1818 BROADWAY CONDOMINIUM HOEOWNERS ASSOCIATION Notice Of Hearing On Petition For Reformation Of The Restated Declaration Of Covenants, Conditions And Restrictions. Appearances: Ann Rankin, Esq. Law Offices of Ann Rankin, (510) 653-8886 x 101, appearing for Petitioner and moving party; Paul F. Utrecht, Esq. of Zacks & Utrecht (415) 956-8100, appearing for Respondents Ruth Lama and Roy Ans. Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Petition is denied. Civil Code section 1356 is not applicable to the instant circumstances. Order signed in open Court.(302/CWW)Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard; Court Reporter: Kent Gubbine CSR 5797
